violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Ice scoop handle was laying in ice bin.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Shelving in dry storage is rusty.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Main handwash sink in kitchen is dripping.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floors in walk ins and in storage areas need painted.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Kitchen floors need cleaned more thoroughly.
